allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add bulk actions for UGC queue: delete and AI processing

Frontend:
- Added card selector checkboxes to each UGC card
- Implemented bulk actions toolbar (fixed at bottom)
- Shows selected count and action buttons
- Cards highlight when selected with blue border
- Toolbar appears/disappears based on selection

Backend:
- POST /ugc/bulk-delete: Delete multiple selected items
- POST /ugc/bulk-ai-process: Process items with AI
  - Uses is_event_classifier to validate if text is an event
  - Uses extract_event_fields to extract structured data
  - Rejects non-events from queue
  - Updates events with extracted form data
  - Returns counts: processed, rejected, updated

AI Processing:
- Validates each item is actually an event
- Extracts: title, date, time, venue, address, price, category
- Updates Redis queue with formatted data
- Removes non-events automatically

Features:
- ✅ Select multiple cards with checkboxes
- ✅ Bulk delete unwanted items
- ✅ AI-powered event validation and formatting
- ✅ Real-time progress feedback
- ✅ Automatic page reload after AI processing

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
